trans-unit.source: Migrate '{0}' to '{1}'? This rewrites SDK imports and updates aspire.config.json and tsconfig.apphost.json.
trans-unit.target: Migrate '{0}' to '{1}'? This rewrites SDK imports and updates aspire.config.json and tsconfig.apphost.json.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the legacy apphost.ts file name, {1} is the modern apphost.mts file name.

trans-unit.source: Migrate a legacy TypeScript AppHost (apphost.ts) to the recommended apphost.mts format.
trans-unit.target: Migrate a legacy TypeScript AppHost (apphost.ts) to the recommended apphost.mts format.

trans-unit.source: Migration cancelled. No changes were made.
trans-unit.target: Migration cancelled. No changes were made.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the legacy apphost.ts file name, {1} is the modern apphost.mts file name.

trans-unit.source: No legacy 'apphost.ts' AppHost was found in the current project. Nothing to migrate.
trans-unit.target: No legacy 'apphost.ts' AppHost was found in the current project. Nothing to migrate.

trans-unit.source: Migration completed, but regenerating the SDK code failed. Run 'aspire restore' to regenerate it.
trans-unit.target: Migration completed, but regenerating the SDK code failed. Run 'aspire restore' to regenerate it.

trans-unit.source: Perform the migration without prompting for confirmation.
trans-unit.target: Perform the migration without prompting for confirmation.
